data.title: BitMart supports Ethereum network hard fork upgrade, temporarily suspends deposits and withdrawals
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of BitMart, in order to cooperate with the hard fork upgrades of OP-ETH (and its tokens), BASE-ETH (and its tokens), MINT-ETH, MODE-ETH, SONEIUM-ETH and UNICHAIN-ETH, BitMart will suspend the recharge and withdrawal services of the above main networks and their related tokens at 23:30 Beijing time on May 9, 2025 (UTC +8). The upgrade is expected to be completed in 1 hour, and user transactions will not be affected during this period. The specific recovery time will be announced separately according to the actual situation.

data.title: Arizona governor signs law for state to keep unclaimed crypto
data.description:
Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs has signed a bill into law allowing the US state to keep unclaimed crypto and establish a “Bitcoin Reserve Fund” that won’t use any taxpayer money or state funds. Hobbs signed House Bill 2749 into law on May 7, which allows Arizona to claim ownership of abandoned digital assets if the owner fails to respond to communications within three years. The state’s custodians can stake the crypto to earn rewards or receive airdrops, which can then be deposited into what Arizona has called a Bitcoin and Digital Asset Reserve Fund. “This law ensures Arizona doesn’t leave value sitting on the table and puts us in a position to lead the country in how we secure, manage, and ultimately benefit from abandoned digital currency,” the bill’s sponsor, Jeff Weninger, said in a May 7 statement
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/arizona-governor-signs-bitcoin-reserve-keep-unclaimed-crypto?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: OKX Wallet now supports Ethereum's latest account abstraction standard EIP-7702
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Wallet has supported Ethereum's latest account abstraction standard EIP-7702, bringing users a more powerful and flexible on-chain interactive experience. Users can upgrade traditional Ethereum EOA (Externally Owned Account) accounts to smart contract accounts, seamlessly connecting with the latest DApps and protocols while continuing to maintain compatibility with current Ethereum standards. OKX Wallet has opened the upgrade portal, and users can choose to upgrade and experience it as needed. To ensure the security of assets, be sure to operate through official channels, beware of phishing links and malicious websites, and avoid asset risks.
It is reported that EIP-7702 is a key Ethereum improvement proposal. It blurs the boundary between traditional accounts and smart contract accounts by giving EOA addresses the ability to temporarily execute smart contract code, bringing a major breakthrough in account abstraction.

data.title: Bitget attended the hackathon event held by Google Developer Community as a sponsor
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News From May 2 to May 5, the "Build with AI" hackathon hosted by Google Developer Group (GDG) was held at Constructor University. Bitget participated in the exchange as the event sponsor to jointly explore the integration potential of Web3 and AI. During the three-day event, participants used Google development tools to build AI-based models and product prototypes, fully demonstrating technological innovation capabilities and practical results.
Earlier news, Bitget launched a campus recruitment plan as part of Bitget's "Blockchain4Youth" corporate social responsibility (CSR) plan, targeting top universities around the world, selecting outstanding graduates with international vision, innovative thinking and exploratory spirit, and committed to cultivating more potential new generation forces in the Web3 field.

data.title: Binance will perform wallet maintenance on Tron Network at 15:00 tomorrow, which is expected to take 1 hour
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will perform wallet maintenance on Tron Network (TRX) at 15:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on May 9, 2025.
To support this maintenance, Binance will suspend the recharge and withdrawal services of Tron Network (TRX) at 14:55 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on May 9, 2025. The maintenance is expected to take 1 hour, and the recharge and withdrawal services will be automatically resumed after the maintenance is completed.

data.title: El Salvador's President Meets with Bitcoin Advocate Jeff Booth
data.description: According to Foresight News, El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele recently met with Jeff Booth, a general partner at Ego Death Capital. During the meeting, Booth expressed his view that El Salvador is a Bitcoin nation.

data.title: Gate.io MemeBox launches MrLeast, gork, urgay, BABIFY
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io MemeBox has now listed Hood Mr Beast (MrLeast), @gork (gork), urgay (urgay) and BABYFICATION (BABIFY), and you can trade by entering the APP.
MemeBox now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in the spot account to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Lookonchain monitoring has revealed that a whale is employing a 40x leverage strategy on Bitcoin and a 25x leverage strategy on Ethereum. The current unrealized profits from these positions have exceeded $970,000.

data.description: According to Odaily, the Texas Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Bill SB 21 has passed the DOGE committee without amendments. The bill now moves forward without needing further committee review and is expected to reach the final voting stage.

data.title: DeFi Development Corp. Announces Stock Split Approval
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, DeFi Development Corp., a publicly traded company on the U.S. stock market, has announced that its board of directors has approved a stock split for its issued and outstanding common shares. 

The stock split will result in each shareholder receiving six additional shares for every share held as of the close of trading on May 19, 2025. As the company's shares are traded on the Nasdaq, the stock trading platform must grant final approval. If approved, the shares will begin trading on a split-adjusted basis starting May 20, 2025.

Following the split, the company's outstanding shares will increase from 2,011,887 to approximately 14,083,209 shares, while the authorized share capital will remain unchanged.

data.title: CZ confirms he has applied for pardon from Trump
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance founder CZ confirmed in the latest podcast that his legal team has submitted an application for pardon to former US President Trump on his behalf. Previously, Bloomberg and the Wall Street Journal reported that CZ was seeking pardon, but he denied it at the time. CZ said that part of the reason for applying for pardon was inspired by Trump's previous pardon of the founder of BitMEX.
Last November, CZ pleaded guilty to violating the Bank Secrecy Act, paid a $50 million fine and was sentenced to 4 months in prison. According to the US Department of Justice, even if he is pardoned, his money laundering charges will not be eliminated, but he may be allowed to resume his management position at Binance.US. (Cointelegraph)
